User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information and role in the platform

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier of the user

role.description: System privilege role assigned to user

disabled.description: Whether the user account is suspended/disabled

Note.title: Study Note
Note.description: User created study notes about a specific companion or general reflections

id.description: The unique identifier of the note document

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier of the author

companionNameAr.description: Optional Arabic name of the associated companion

companionNameEn.description: Optional English name of the associated companion

content.description: Main body text of the study reflection note

History.title: Navigation History
History.description: User navigation history records tracking visited companion screens

userId.description: The owner of the navigation history record

companionId.description: The ID of the visited companion

companionNameAr.description: The Arabic name of the visited companion

companionNameEn.description: The English name of the visited companion

Video.title: YouTube Video Link
Video.description: Educational YouTube video or audiovisual resource associated with a Companion

id.description: Unique video ID or Firestore document key

companionId.description: The ID of the companion this video relates to

titleAr.description: Arabic title or caption of the video

youtubeUrl.description: Full YouTube URL or embed link

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this reference was added

addedBy.description: The user ID of the moderator who added this link

Banner.title: Left Media Banner
Banner.description: Left press sidebar media banner contents

enabled.description: Display switch status of the banner

mediaUrl.description: Direct link or attachment stream URL of media source

linkUrl.description: Anchor route target URL when clicked

banners/{bannerId}.description: Configuration metadata for the left media press banner

videos/{videoId}.description: Global list of authorized educational audiovisual YouTube media assets

users/{userId}.description: The collection of user accounts and profile documents
